items.text: In June 2026, the collective bargaining agreement in New York City will expire.
items.rationale: Adds a specific expiration date for an existing collective bargaining agreement risk, providing concrete detail rather than introducing a new type of risk.

items.text: Three of our hotels are subject to the collective bargaining agreement: the New York Marriott Marquis, the New York Marriott Downtown, and 1 Hotel Central Park.
items.rationale: Specifies which particular hotels are subject to the collective bargaining agreement, adding concreteness to an already-existing labor relations risk.

items.text: Beginning after the calendar year ending December 31, 2025, the 20% threshold will increase to 25%.
items.rationale: Provides a specific numeric threshold change (20% to 25%) that appears to detail an existing regulatory/tax-related risk rather than introduce a wholly new risk.
